title: baeckea pentandra
intro: Baeckea pentandra, also known as the Fraser Island baeckea or the Fraser Island baeckea bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Baeckea pentandra include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Baeckea pentandra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
